metadata.title: Leonel — Software Engineer
metadata.description: Personal developer portfolio and collaboration hub. Let's build something together.

hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: I build reliable software and help teams ship faster. Open to collaboration, consulting, and open-source work.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph_1: I'm a software engineer who cares deeply about building things that work well — for users and for the teams behind them. I specialize in full-stack development, system architecture, and turning complex problems into clean, maintainable solutions.
about.paragraph_2: Currently, I'm building <nexora>Nexora Group</nexora>, a software consultancy focused on delivering high-quality digital products. I work across the entire stack — from React and Next.js frontends to PostgreSQL databases and Docker infrastructure.
about.paragraph_3: I'm bilingual (English/Spanish) and based in Latin America. Whether you need a technical co-founder for your next project, architecture advice, or an extra pair of hands on your codebase — I'm open to the conversation.
